primary_sources.name: CMS Emergency Preparedness Requirements for Medicare and Medicaid Participating Providers and Suppliers
primary_sources.relevance: Establishes mandatory emergency preparedness requirements for dialysis facilities including risk assessment, communication plans, and training requirements

primary_sources.name: 42 CFR 494.62 - Condition for Coverage: Emergency Preparedness
primary_sources.relevance: Specific regulatory text detailing emergency preparedness requirements for ESRD facilities

primary_sources.name: CMS Emergency Preparedness Checklist for Dialysis Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Provides implementation guidance and compliance checklist for dialysis facility emergency preparedness programs

primary_sources.name: Kidney Community Emergency Response (KCER) Coalition Resources
primary_sources.relevance: Specialized emergency preparedness resources and tools specifically developed for the kidney care community

secondary_sources.name: Emergency Preparedness for Patients on Dialysis
secondary_sources.organization: Clinical Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
secondary_sources.relevance: Clinical perspective on emergency preparedness challenges and solutions for dialysis patients
